name: QA 244
description:
PCP QA Test No. 244

PMCD SIGHUP processing tests with $PCP_PMCDCONF_PATH changes



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce

output mismatch (see 244.out.bad)

> Job for pmlogger.service failed because the service did not take the steps required by its unit configuration.
> See "systemctl status pmlogger.service" and "journalctl -xe" for details.
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e4c2a05926f7 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e4c2a05926f7 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h e4c2a05926f7 -f simple.numfetch
